title: All my benchmarks so far were not leveraging cache, but in the real world scenarios you don't start with a 128K context, you go up incrementally, so TTFT must take KV Cache into account. Adding this aspect to my long context benchmarks. Stay tuned 🚀

content.summary: All my benchmarks so far were not leveraging cache, but in the real world scenarios you don't start with a 128K context, you go up incrementally, so TTFT must take KV Cache into account. Adding this aspect to my long context benchmarks. Stay tuned 🚀
